requirement_topic.en: PSQCA Scope Screening for Lithium BESS and Components
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电BESS及部件PSQCA适用范围筛查
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電BESS及部件PSQCA適用範圍篩查

summary.en: PSQCA publishes Pakistan Standards, adopted ISO/IEC standards, and compulsory-item information. Public sources do not clearly establish lithium BESS as a whole-product compulsory PSQCA item. Screen the exact shipment by HS code, product family, and bill of materials because cells, modules, PCS, transformers, switchgear, cables, plugs, protective devices, or other electrical accessories may have separate Pakistan Standard or certification routes.
summary.zh: PSQCA发布巴基斯坦标准、采纳的ISO/IEC标准和强制产品信息。公开资料未能清楚表明锂电BESS整机属于PSQCA强制产品。应按HS编码、产品族和物料清单筛查具体货批，因为电芯、模组、PCS、变压器、开关设备、电缆、插头、保护装置或其他电气附件可能有单独的巴基斯坦标准或认证路径。
summary.zht: PSQCA發布巴基斯坦標準、採納的ISO/IEC標準和強制產品資訊。公開資料未能清楚表明鋰電BESS整機屬於PSQCA強制產品。應按HS編碼、產品族和物料清單篩查具體貨批，因為電芯、模組、PCS、變壓器、開關設備、電纜、插頭、保護裝置或其他電氣附件可能有單獨的巴基斯坦標準或認證路徑。

standards_or_laws: PSQCA list of compulsory items to meet Pakistan Standards
Pakistan Standard, tender, customs, importer, inspection-body, or authority route where confirmed

summary.en: China GB evidence under GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558-2023 can support a technical file but does not by itself prove PSQCA adoption, compulsory status, or acceptance for the exact BESS or component.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023项下的中国GB证据可支持技术资料，但本身不能证明PSQCA采标、强制状态或对具体BESS/部件的接受性。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023項下的中國GB證據可支持技術資料，但本身不能證明PSQCA採標、強制狀態或對具體BESS／部件的接受性。

gap.en: Merged former PSQCA route, compulsory-item screening, adoption, and recognition-limit rows: obtain written confirmation on whether the shipment needs a PS mark, Pakistan Standard evidence, direct IEC report, mapped China GB report, recognized-lab report, or only project due-diligence documents.
gap.zh: 已合并原PSQCA路径、强制产品筛查、采标和认可边界行：应取得书面确认，明确该货批需要PS标志、巴基斯坦标准证据、直接IEC报告、映射后的中国GB报告、认可实验室报告，还是仅需项目尽调文件。
gap.zht: 已合併原PSQCA路徑、強制產品篩查、採標和認可邊界行：應取得書面確認，明確該貨批需要PS標誌、巴基斯坦標準證據、直接IEC報告、映射後的中國GB報告、認可實驗室報告，還是僅需項目盡調文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only for products or components that fall under PSQCA compulsory-item scope, a Pakistan Standard, customs route, tender, contract, inspection-body decision, or authority requirement; lithium BESS as a whole product is not clearly confirmed as compulsory from public PSQCA sources
mandatory_status.cn: China GB evidence may be mandatory or recommended depending on the exact standard and product scope; it remains China-side evidence unless the Pakistan route accepts it

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat PSQCA as a scope-confirmation gate for Pakistan BESS imports. Do not claim lithium BESS whole-product compulsory PSQCA approval unless the exact route confirms it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将PSQCA作为巴基斯坦BESS进口的适用范围确认关口。除非具体路径确认，不应声称锂电BESS整机必须或已经取得PSQCA批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將PSQCA作為巴基斯坦BESS進口的適用範圍確認關口。除非具體路徑確認，不應聲稱鋰電BESS整機必須或已經取得PSQCA批准。

summary.en: IEC 62619:2022 is the current IEC safety standard for secondary lithium cells and batteries for industrial applications, and IEC 62933 is the IEC electrical energy storage system series. In Pakistan BESS files, these are normally project, tender, insurer, EPC, owner, inspection-body, or PSQCA-route evidence only when the exact part and edition are called up.
summary.zh: IEC 62619:2022是现行工业用二次锂电芯和电池IEC安全标准，IEC 62933是IEC电能储能系统系列。在巴基斯坦BESS资料中，通常只有在具体分册和版本被项目、招标、保险方、EPC、业主、检验机构或PSQCA路径引用时，才作为相关证据。
summary.zht: IEC 62619:2022是現行工業用二次鋰電芯和電池IEC安全標準，IEC 62933是IEC電能儲能系統系列。在巴基斯坦BESS資料中，通常只有在具體分冊和版本被項目、招標、保險方、EPC、業主、檢驗機構或PSQCA路徑引用時，才作為相關證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2 where system-safety evidence is requested

summary.en: Map GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 to IEC 62619 where battery safety is requested, and map GB/T 36558-2023 to the exact IEC 62933 part where system-level evidence is requested.
summary.zh: 如要求电池安全证据，应将GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023映射至IEC 62619；如要求系统级证据，应将GB/T 36558-2023映射至具体IEC 62933分册。
summary.zht: 如要求電池安全證據，應將GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023映射至IEC 62619；如要求系統級證據，應將GB/T 36558-2023映射至具體IEC 62933分冊。

gap.en: Confirm the accepted title, edition, report language, laboratory accreditation, certification mark if any, sample representativeness, and whether the reviewer wants a certificate, a test report, or a clause-level technical crosswalk.
gap.zh: 应确认被接受的标准名称、版本、报告语言、实验室资质、是否有认证标志、样品代表性，以及审查方要求的是证书、测试报告还是条款级技术对照。
gap.zht: 應確認被接受的標準名稱、版本、報告語言、實驗室資質、是否有認證標誌、樣品代表性，以及審查方要求的是證書、測試報告還是條款級技術對照。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary or project-required unless PSQCA adoption, tender, contract, insurer, utility, inspection body, or authority route calls up the exact IEC part and edition
mandatory_status.cn: Usually additional export or project evidence; China mandatory status depends on the GB standard scope, while GB/T standards are recommended unless incorporated by project or contract

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 are useful evidence families, but Pakistan BESS compliance depends on the exact adopted standard, direct IEC acceptance, tender, contract, or project-review route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62619和IEC 62933是有用的证据体系，但巴基斯坦BESS合规取决于具体采标、直接IEC接受、招标、合同或项目审查路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62619和IEC 62933是有用的證據體系，但巴基斯坦BESS合規取決於具體採標、直接IEC接受、招標、合約或項目審查路徑。
